underlying_goal: Plan Phase 39 of their roadmap, then explore how to make the knowledge base accessible for remote Claude Code execution, leading to architectural decisions about project-local KB and roadmap updates

brief_summary: User ran plan-phase for Phase 39, then explored project-local KB architecture for remote execution support, resulting in a deliberation document, new Phase 38.1 insertion, and Phase 41 scope updates.
